title: engagementConversationMessageReactionType
description: Types of reactions to conversation messages.

values.description: Like reaction, represented as a thumbs-up hand. A positive sentiment.
values.name: like

values.description: Love reaction, represented as a solid heart shape. A very positive sentiment.
values.name: love

values.description: Celebrate reaction, represented as a party hat. A positive sentiment.
values.name: celebrate

values.description: Thank reaction, represented as applauding hands. A positive sentiment.
values.name: thank

values.description: Laugh reaction, represented as a grinning face. A positive sentiment.
values.name: laugh

values.description: Sad reaction, represented as a frowning face. A sympathetic sentiment.
values.name: sad

values.description: Happy reaction, represented as an open mouth smile face. A very positive sentiment.
values.name: happy

values.description: Excited reaction, represented as a face with closed eyes and a big smile. A very positive sentiment.
values.name: excited

values.description: Smiling reaction, represented as a face with a small smile. A positive sentiment.
values.name: smile

values.description: Silly reaction, represented as an upside down smiling face. A positive sentiment.
values.name: silly

values.description: Intense laughter reaction, represented as a crying laughing face. A very positive sentiment.
values.name: intenseLaugh

values.description: Star struck reaction, represented as a face with stars for eyes. A very positive sentiment.
values.name: starStruck

values.description: Goofy reaction, represented as a face with tongue sticking out of mouth. A positive sentiment.
values.name: goofy

values.description: Thinking reaction, represented as a face with a hand on the chin. A neutral sentiment.
values.name: thinking

values.description: Surprised reaction, represented as a face with its mouth open. A neutral sentiment.
values.name: surprised

values.description: Mind blown reaction, represented as a face with its head covered in an exploding cloud. A positive sentiment.
values.name: mindBlown

values.description: Scared reaction, represented as a face with fearful look. A negative sentiment.
values.name: scared

values.description: Crying reaction, represented as a face with tears streaming down. A negative sentiment.
values.name: crying

values.description: Shocked reaction, represented as a face with two hands against cheeks and mouth open. A negative sentiment.
values.name: shocked

values.description: Angry reaction, represented as a face with furrowed eyebrows and sad mouth. A very negative sentiment.
values.name: angry

values.description: Agree reaction, represented as a hand pointing upward. A positive sentiment.
values.name: agree

values.description: Praise reaction, represented as two hands facing outward. A positive sentiment.
values.name: praise

values.description: Taking notes reaction, represented as a hand holding a pen. A neutral sentiment.
values.name: takingNotes

values.description: Heart broken reaction, represented as a broken heart. A negative sentiment.
values.name: heartBroken

values.description: Support reaction, represented as red numbers showing 100. A positive sentiment.
values.name: support

values.description: Confirmed reaction, represented as a green check mark. A neutral sentiment.
values.name: confirmed

values.description: Watching reaction, represented as two eyeballs. A neutral sentiment.
values.name: watching

values.description: Brain reaction, represented as a brain. A neutral sentiment.
values.name: brain

values.description: Medal reaction, represented as a medal hanging from a sash. A positive sentiment.
values.name: medal

values.description: Bullseye reaction, represented as a target with an arrow in the middle. A positive sentiment.
values.name: bullseye

values.description: A marker value for members added after the release of this API.
values.name: unknownFutureValue
